title: Reading and Use of English - Part 1
description: For questions 1–8, read the text below and decide which answer (A, B, C or D) best fits each gap.

content.text:
In what can only be described as an impressive (1) ______ of research, a schoolboy in the USA has calculated that the state and federal governments could save getting on for $400m a year by changing the typeface they use for printed documents.

Shocked by the number of printed handouts he was receiving from his teachers, the 14-year-old boy decided to investigate the cost. He established that ink (2) ______ up to 60% of the cost of a printed page and is, gram for gram, twice as expensive as some famous perfumes. He then started looking at the different typefaces and discovered that, by (3) ______ to one called Garamond with its thin, elegant strokes, his school district could reduce its ink (4) ______ by 24% annually. Working on that (5) ______ , the federal savings would be enormous.

(6) ______ , earlier studies of the (7) ______ of font choice have shown that it can affect more than just cost. The typeface that a document uses also (8) ______ how much of the information is retained and whether it is worth taking seriously.

questions.question: impressive (1) ...... of research
questions.explanation: La respuesta correcta es 'piece' (C). 'Piece of research' es una colocación común en inglés que significa 'una investigación'.

questions.question: ink (2) ...... up to 60% of the cost
questions.explanation: 'Accounts for' significa 'representa' o 'constituye'. Las otras opciones no encajan gramaticalmente.

questions.question: by (3) ...... to one called Garamond
questions.explanation: 'Switching to' significa 'cambiar a'. Es la opción más natural para cambiar de tipo de letra.

questions.question: reduce its ink (4) ...... by 24%
questions.explanation: 'Ink consumption' es la expresión más formal y técnica para 'consumo de tinta'.

questions.question: Working on that (5) ......
questions.explanation: 'On that basis' significa 'sobre esa base' o 'a partir de ese principio'.

questions.question: (6) ...... , earlier studies
questions.explanation: 'Interestingly' significa 'curiosamente' o 'es interesante que'. Conecta con la idea de que ya se habían hecho estudios antes.

questions.question: studies of the (7) ...... of font choice
questions.explanation: 'Issue' aquí significa 'tema' o 'asunto', con connotación de que es algo que se debate o analiza.

questions.question: also (8) ...... how much
questions.explanation: 'Influences' significa 'influye'. Es el verbo más adecuado para este contexto.
